messages.author: swarm
messages.text: This ticket needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve" to approve it.

messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Acceptance step files must reap their detached process trees, plus an orphan-fixture reaper
What it solves: EXPEDITE (Operator directive, 2026-07-16): a real, tracked bug — spec ahead of
the backlog-root queue, promote ahead of the paused queue. Do NOT "fix" it by
a silent manual kill of today's orphans; the cleanup of today's orphans falls
out of the reaper this ticket delivers.
How it works: The orphan reaper reaps a fixture root only when it matches a known fixture prefix AND is stale AND is not the live swarm socket root
